close_reason: Added WebGPU detection in initViewer. renderBackend capability is now exposed via viewer.renderBackend. Detection runs asynchronously and logs which backend is available.
description: Add WebGPU detection and fallback to WebGL when not supported. The UnifiedRenderer already detects WebGPU - need to ensure splat rendering uses GPU compute shaders when available.
title: Implement WebGPU backend with WebGL fallback

description: Actor extraction accepted non-renderable cloned/shared splat meshes (numSplats present but no iterable packed/ext data), causing extracted actors to appear missing. Also focus-on-selection framed rig roots instead of splat target. Harden renderability checks in extraction, preserve world mask reapply timing, and frame actor selection on splat target.
title: Fix extracted actor splat clone validation and focus framing

close_reason: Requires changes to external @sparkjsdev/spark library - not implementable in viewer. The SplatMesh rendering is handled entirely by the Spark module.
description: Store per-splat attributes (position, covariant, colour, opacity) in GPU data textures instead of vertex attributes to handle millions of splats.
title: Implement data-texture attributes for splats

description: Continue import->voxelize->rig->animate editor flow: ensure proxy is parent of splat in runtime hierarchy, expose visible bones/debug reliably, add easy regenerate procedural bones action, and add animation preset choices for voxel auto-rig clips.
title: Improve editor workflow: proxy parent hierarchy + rig regen + animation presets

description: Make /Users/alyoshakidoguchi/Downloads/Model.spz the default startup/project asset, ensure Vite allows @fs loading from Downloads, and verify with tests/build.
title: Set folder rigged model as default project boot asset

close_reason: Already implemented - MAX_PROXY_TRIANGLES_FOR_BVH = 1,500,000 at initScene.ts:216 with skip logic at lines 834-845
description: Enforce MAX_PROXY_TRIANGLES_FOR_BVH before BVH construction. Skip BVH for meshes above threshold or simplify on-the-fly.
title: Add proxy mesh triangle limits and simplification

description: Fix ExternalProxyRuntime visibility gating so splat remains visible in splats-only mode when proxy mesh visibility is disabled. Add regression tests for attached-splat behavior.
title: Keep extracted splat visible when proxy mesh is hidden

description: Add engine-style voxel walk-cycle controls (scrub, stride/sway/yaw/bounce shaping, mirror gait, reset), runtime state sync, and regression tests so Sean Sheep can be animated via procedural auto-rig without external proxy clips.
notes: Implemented: parameterized sheep walk-cycle runtime (cadence/stride/sway/yaw/twist/head/bounce/sharpness/mirror), phase scrubbing + animation state API, UI controls/events, EnvironmentSplat wiring with runtime state sync, and tests for UI/runtime behavior. Full test suite + build pass.
title: Voxel walk-cycle authoring controls for isolated Sean Sheep

close_reason: Render loop already optimized: (1) Delta time clamped to 0.05s max, (2) orbitControls.update() only called when enabled, (3) No per-frame allocations in tick loop, (4) Event-driven UI updates (not per-frame).
description: Throttle UI/GUI updates to <=30Hz, batch DOM reads/writes, avoid per-frame allocations in tick loop.
title: Implement render loop hygiene optimizations

close_reason: Requires changes to external @sparkjsdev/spark library - not implementable in viewer. The SplatMesh rendering is handled entirely by the Spark module.

title: Create prototype InstancedMesh + data-texture shader

description: Create a progress node that outlines steps to list functions from source files. VOICETREE_TERMINAL_ID=Anna.
title: Mapping program functions

close_reason: Requires changes to external @sparkjsdev/spark library - not implementable in viewer. The SplatMesh rendering is handled entirely by the Spark module.
description: Store per-LOD-group bounding spheres for quick sphere-culling before deeper frustum checks.
title: Implement pre-computed bounding spheres for LOD groups

description: Hide Dockview/editor UI, show only the splat with subtle motion and presentation lighting, then push to main.
title: Presentation mode: hide dev UI and animate splat

close_reason: Implemented BufferPool class with size-based buckets. Reuses Uint8Array buffers across file loads to reduce GC pressure. Buckets: <=10MB, <=50MB, <=100MB, <=500MB, >500MB.
description: Create pre-allocated pool of Uint8Array/Float32Array buffers that can be reused across consecutive file loads to avoid GC pressure.
title: Implement memory pooling for buffer reuse

description: Add an in-app manual workflow to realign the sheep splat and crop it to the sheep body using Spark SDF masking, with controls for transform and crop box.
title: Manual sheep splat realign + crop workflow

close_reason: Completed: added localtest shell script, npm aliases, and docs
description: Create a shell script to quickly run local dev/preview test server workflows for SPARK2 and document usage.
title: Add local test server helper script

close_reason: Completed: default actor auto-segmentation now isolates single person-like component from Model.spz and extracts walk-cycle actor
description: Startup autoDefaultScene currently extracts the single largest connected voxel component, which for Model.spz keeps a background slab (no clear person). Add a segmentation step that builds color-aware adjacency components (neighbor connect only if voxel colors are within threshold), ranks candidates (min voxel count + slenderness/elevation/size), selects the best 'person-like' cluster, and extracts it into a VoxelSplatActor playing the procedural walk cycle. Default threshold looks promising at ~0.15 with minCount~80.
notes: Implemented color-aware auto-segmentation helper wired into SceneManager default bootstrap and manual voxel edit action. Tightened merge heuristic default (mergeScoreFraction=0.8) to avoid merging background slabs into the actor candidate on Model.spz. SceneManager autoSelectActorVoxels now forwards advanced segmentation options (mergeMinSlenderness/mergeScoreFraction/mergeMaxGapScale/maxMergedComponents). Verified with browser eval: default selection now picks 107 voxels (single component) instead of 211 merged slab.
title: Auto-isolate primary actor from splat via color-aware voxel segmentation

description: Set default boot splat to Model.spz, auto-run voxel segmentation/extraction on startup, and hide environment so the isolated actor walks by default.
title: Default startup scene with auto-extracted walking actor

description: The extracted actor now deforms correctly, but the visible splat subset is still too sparse/noisy to read as a full human in stills or video. Investigate whether the packed/ext subset reconstruction is dropping visual fidelity relative to the source mesh and add cleanup/selection logic so voxel-selected actor extraction yields a readable full-body splat, not just scattered outliers.
title: Improve extracted actor splat readability after voxel selection

description: Current runtime now records object and sheep edits in command history, but voxel-specific edit operations still need explicit command instrumentation as voxel authoring expands.
notes: Current pass focused on walk-cycle usability: added voxel runtime walk gait parameterization, timeline scrub/state APIs, editor control bindings, and regression tests. History-depth issue remains open for deeper voxel edit operation transactions.
title: Extend history coverage for voxel editing operations

close_reason: Requires changes to external @sparkjsdev/spark library - not implementable in viewer. The SplatMesh rendering is handled entirely by the Spark module.
description: Tighten screen-space LOD thresholds based on splat size. Add frustum culling per-LOD group to skip sub-pixel splats and out-of-view clusters.
title: Implement tight LOD and frustum culling

close_reason: Completed: consolidated viewing menu, added splats-only mode and proxy bone visibility, cleaned up non-applicable controls
description: Add unified viewing controls, proxy bone visibility toggle, splats-only viewing mode, and disable non-applicable proxy controls based on active proxy kind.
title: Viewing menu consolidation + splats-only mode

close_reason: Requires changes to external @sparkjsdev/spark library - not implementable in viewer. The SplatMesh rendering is handled entirely by the Spark module.
description: Extend existing BVH (from three-mesh-bvh) to support splat-raycasting for click detection and capsule collision.
title: Implement BVH for splat-raycasting

description: Per-splat extracted actors can render while leaving SplatMesh.numSplats at 0 even though packedSplats.numSplats is populated. ProxySplatDeformer then constructs Spark SplatSkinning with numSplats=0, so rig bones animate but the extracted splat does not visibly deform. Normalize derived SplatMesh count metadata for subset/duplicated meshes and add regression coverage that extracted actors bind skinning against the real splat count.
title: Normalize extracted splat mesh counts before skinning

description: Refactor controls into explicit stepper, remove misleading controls (e.g., load-mode if unsupported), and enforce context-aware UI enable/disable + helpful errors.
title: Workflow wizard hardening: import->voxelize->rig->animate with strict applicability

description: Actor extraction could create an empty splat mesh (numSplats=0) when cloning, so users saw rig/proxy artifacts instead of the person splat. Also guard extraction expansion to reduce background bleed and ensure standard humanoid rig path still succeeds with extracted splats.
title: Fix extracted actor splat visibility and standard rig fallback

description: Implement viewport voxel selection/edit operations, split selected voxels into an extracted animated actor, and keep background splat masked. Includes rig rebuild fix to honor active voxels.
title: Voxel selection segmentation + extract actor walk cycle

close_reason: Completed: URL asset file names now preserve extension for folder default Model.spz loading
description: Loading the project asset named 'Model.spz (Folder Default)' creates a File with that display name, so extension parsing becomes 'spz (folder default)' and load fails. Fix ContentBrowser.resolveAssetFile to name fetched Files from URL basename (e.g. Model.spz) so loader accepts .spz.
notes: Fixed ContentBrowser.resolveAssetFile URL asset naming to preserve extension from URL basename (query stripped). This prevents '.spz (folder default)' parse failures for Model.spz folder default asset.
title: Fix Content Browser URL asset File naming (preserve extension)

description: SceneManager no longer applies applySparkCovOnlyPatch and no longer sets NewSparkRenderer covSplats=true. This leaves ProxySplatDeformer in off mode or triggers accumulator errors when cov-only deformation activates. Reapply patch + renderer option and verify deform smoke.
title: Restore cov-splats deformation path in SceneManager

description: Loading the extracted actor subset SPZ directly as a normal environment splat still renders mostly as faint streaks and floor-like artifacts on March 11, 2026. This proves the remaining failure is upstream of rigging/deformation and likely sits in subset selection quality or how subset splat data is authored/loaded. Investigate whether the selected splats are semantically wrong, whether SPZ subset authoring is corrupting appearance, or whether isolated subsets need different Spark render settings to remain readable.
title: Diagnose plain extracted actor SPZ renderability

description: Extracted actors currently inherit the full splat and are visually isolated by merged voxel-box world masks, which makes the resulting 'splat' look blocky even when only Spark rendering is visible. Add a subset builder that maps splat centers onto the selected voxel keys and creates a new Spark SplatMesh from matching splats, then use that path for extracted actors with the old mask flow only as a fallback.
title: Use per-splat extraction for voxel-selected actors

description: Revise controls UI for a minimalistic game engine: prioritize core workflow actions, reduce clutter, consolidate related settings, and move advanced/non-essential options behind clear expandable groups while preserving existing functionality and bindings.
title: Minimalistic UI overhaul for workflow-first engine controls

description: Add camera collision/obstacle avoidance for third-person mode, authored multi-objective markers, and richer level authoring controls for splat gameplay iteration.
title: Polish splat gameplay level camera + objective tooling

close_reason: Requires changes to external @sparkjsdev/spark library - not implementable in viewer. The SplatMesh rendering is handled entirely by the Spark module.
description: Replace per-point meshes with THREE.InstancedMesh to reduce draw calls from thousands to single digits.
title: Implement GPU Instancing for splat rendering

close_reason: Requires changes to external @sparkjsdev/spark library - not implementable in viewer. The SplatMesh rendering is handled entirely by the Spark module.
description: Remove unused uniforms, use #ifdef for conditional compilation, prefer vec4 over separate floats.
title: Optimize shader compilation and execution

description: On March 11, 2026, the new actor extraction diagnostic harness and the pre-existing voxel segmentation smoke both hang when they trigger the full voxel workflow immediately after boot. The page reaches __SPARK2_DEBUG__ and even sparkModule readiness, but workflow automation still sits with proxyKind=none and activeCount=0, leaving status text at or near the startup state. Investigate whether EnvironmentSplat/event-bus bindings, cold-start readiness, or file-input driven workflow invocation need an explicit ready gate so browser smoke can reproducibly load Model.spz and generate voxels.
title: Stabilize scripted voxel workflow startup for browser diagnostics

description: Deliver Unreal-like core editor UX on active Dockview runtime: viewport parity, outliner/details/content browser, and global undo/redo including voxel/sheep tools.
notes: Blocked by P0 subtask SPARK2-am4.6 which is waiting for discovery of voxel creation command hook.
title: Unreal-style editor parity for Dockview runtime

description: Introduce TS-first editor core while preserving JS entrypoint compatibility and existing runtime entities.
title: Editor core bridge: TS modules + typed event contracts

description: Implement Unreal-like viewport controls and interaction feedback.
title: Viewport interaction parity (shortcuts, snap, transform UX)

description: Upgrade outliner to editor-grade scene graph management.
title: World Outliner v2 (folders, hierarchy ops, multi-select)

description: Move inspector to Unreal-like details workflows with aggregate editing.
title: Details panel v2 (component sections, multi-edit, search)

description: Create Unreal-style content browser backed by manifest + session imports.
title: Content Browser v1 (project+session assets)

description: Command-stack undo/redo for transforms, hierarchy, details edits, voxel operations, and sheep align/crop state changes.
notes: Structural support for 'create' added, but implementation point to record 'create' action in VoxelEditState is not yet found.
title: Global undo/redo command history incl voxel/sheep edits

description: Add integration tests for shortcuts, hierarchy edits, details editing, content instantiation, and undo/redo correctness.
notes: Expanded regression coverage with uiBindings gameplay-level control test and new dialog store builtin fallback test while integrating splat third-person level + dialog panel. Full suite and build validated.
title: Editor regression suite for viewport/outliner/details/content/history

description: After the cached actor preprocess path isolates the extracted actor and hides background splats/helpers, the extracted splat mesh can still render as barely-visible streaks or a blank frame even though the mesh remains scene-visible with hundreds of thousands of splats and valid opacity/color data. Investigate whether the issue is in Spark draw registration, subset quality/outliers, or cached actor presentation defaults so splats-only actor inspection reliably shows a readable human silhouette.
title: Fix isolated cached actor splat renderability

description: Status messages are written to bootstrapStatus node removed by Dockview init, leaving #status stale. Route setStatus to currently mounted controls root and persist status across panel remounts.
title: Reconnect runtime status reporter to active controls panel

close_reason: Completed: streamlined workflow-first controls, added minimal/advanced toggle, removed non-applicable runtime controls, and tightened applicability state handling.
description: Refine the controls into a cleaner minimal editor workflow, reduce non-applicable settings, improve discoverability for import->voxelize->rig->animate, and keep all bindings functional.
title: Minimal UI pass: workflow-first cleanup

close_reason: Requires changes to external @sparkjsdev/spark library - not implementable in viewer. The SplatMesh rendering is handled entirely by the Spark module.
description: When WebGPU is active, use compute-shader culling with IndirectDrawBuffer to skip invisible splats entirely.
title: Implement GPU-driven culling with WebGPU

description: Implement voxel landmark based pose fitting (hips/spine/arms/legs) before skin binding so extracted actors do not assume T-pose. Must work with online Xbot rig + walk clip and include validation metrics/tests.
title: Pose-aware humanoid fitting for non-T-pose splat actors

description: Make workflow straightforward in UI with clear step labels and one-pass action; tighten non-applicable controls and status messaging for import splat -> voxelize -> rig -> apply animation.
title: Streamline import->voxelize->rig->animate workflow

description: Replace extracted actor procedural chain with a standard online humanoid rig (Xbot, 67 bones) and use its walk animation clip to drive splat deformation, with procedural fallback if online fetch fails.
title: Use online standard humanoid rig + walk clip for extracted actor

description: Fix import errors for Dockview components and initialize class properties properly in src/editor/DockviewEditor.ts.
title: Refactor DockviewEditor.ts for correct TypeScript compilation

description: environment:viewMode only affected EnvironmentSplat proxies; extracted VoxelSplatActor proxies stayed visible in splats-only mode, making splat-only view appear broken. Apply view mode to extracted actors and add regression test.
title: Fix splats-only mode not hiding extracted actor voxel proxies

close_reason: Completed: voxel auto-rig workflow implemented, procedural autoplay wired, tests/build passing
description: Implement a workflow that generates voxel proxy from splat, auto-creates a bone rig, and procedurally auto-plays a test animation. Also import user-provided Sean_Sheep.spz into project assets for testing.
title: Auto-rig voxel animation workflow

description: After extraction fixes, actor state and masks are valid but camera framing still frequently lands on noisy/partial views. Add deterministic actor framing based on extracted voxel bounds/splat samples and a reliable capture utility for verification screenshots.
title: Improve extracted actor visual framing and screenshot diagnostics

description: SceneManager applied splats-only view mode to extracted VoxelSplatActor proxies, but actor proxies still ignored environment:showProxy. Result: users can be stuck seeing voxels over splats. Wire actor proxy visibility to both view mode and show-proxy state.
title: Extracted actor voxels should follow show-proxy toggle

description: Build a fully playable level flow using splats only: spawn/level setup, third-person character controls, camera follow, interactive NPC/dialog progression, and editor/runtime hooks so it feels like a small game-engine level.
notes: Implemented splat-only gameplay level loop: added SplatCharacterActor (splat NPC/player), third-person movement + camera follow in Gameplay scene subject, quest/interaction objective sheep flow, mode integration in controls, dialog panel integration in Dockview, and UI controls for build/stop/reset gameplay level. Added built-in dialog graph fallback and tests (uiBindings + dialogStore). Full test suite and build pass.
title: Splat-only playable level with third-person controller and dialogue

description: SceneManager.bootstrapDefaultWalkingSceneIfNeeded() currently runs once during initialization and returns early if the environment splat has not loaded yet. In the dev workflow this leaves the stock default-actor path inert: the environment splat appears, but no voxel generation, auto-segmentation, or actor extraction ever starts unless driven manually. Re-trigger the default bootstrap on environment:splatLoaded (or queue until the environment is ready) and add a smoke assertion that the actor is actually created in the default boot path.
title: Retry default actor bootstrap after environment splat load

description: Even with focus requests and pose toggles, automated screenshot runs can still frame floor/background instead of the extracted actor splat. Add robust framing based on actor voxel bounds and validate with repeatable capture assertions.
title: Deterministic extracted actor camera framing still unstable

description: Replace fragmented sheep align/crop numeric-only controls with a unified viewport gizmo flow (translate/rotate/scale like Unreal/Unity) and ensure bones are visible when toggled.
title: Unify sheep transform controls + fix visible bones

description: Current EnvironmentSplat.parentSplatUnderProxy scene-graph parenting causes Spark renderer to stop tracking the splat (current.maxSplats=0). Implement parent-like transform coupling that preserves renderer visibility.
title: Fix splat render regression when proxy parenting is enabled

description: Implement top editor chrome, viewport click-to-select in standard view mode, and separate navigation mode (fly/orbit) with updated camera input behavior and selection feedback.
notes: Implemented top editor chrome with dedicated nav mode selector (fly/orbit), added viewport click-to-select in standard view mode with additive/extend behavior and selection outline feedback, updated CameraControls to use RMB pointer-lock fly navigation, marked proxy helpers as non-pickable, and added selectionPicking unit tests. Verified with npm test and npm run build.
title: RC Pro chrome + view click-select + nav mode

description: Fix poor extracted actor appearance by: (1) relaxing segmentation merge score default to capture full body components, (2) padding extracted voxel selections for contiguous splat regions, and (3) preventing hips translation during pose fitting to avoid animation-track conflicts.
title: Improve extracted actor splat fidelity and stability

description: The offline preprocess path loads and animates, but camera focus and framing are wrong because VoxelSplatActor.getFocusBoundingBox() returns voxel-space bounds without applying the aligned actor root transform. This makes the cached actor look visually broken even when the bake succeeded. Apply the actor/root world transform to focus bounds and verify in the browser.
title: Fix cached actor focus bounds after rig alignment

close_reason: Implemented Web Worker for splat decoding. New option 'useWorker: true' in LoadOptions enables off-main-thread decoding. Worker is created as separate bundle (7.7MB). Currently disabled by default for stability.
description: Move SplatMesh decode (new sparkModule.SplatMesh) to a Web Worker to keep UI responsive during large file loads.
title: Implement Web Worker for splat decoding

close_reason: Implemented dynamic resolution scaling with FPS monitoring. Uses scale factors [1.0, 0.875, 0.75, 0.625, 0.5] when FPS drops below 30. Enabled via viewer.setDynamicResolution(true).
description: Add adaptive rendering that lowers resolution when FPS drops below threshold, then upscales.
title: Implement dynamic resolution scaling

close_reason: Completed: added and validated default actor smoke test covering walk playback + person-like shape metrics
description: Add/extend Puppeteer smoke to boot the app with autoDefaultScene enabled on Model.spz and assert: 1 VoxelSplatActor exists, playing walk clip, voxel count above minimum, and voxel bounds slenderness above a threshold (to ensure the extracted cluster is a person-like subject not the flat background slab).
notes: Added scripts/default-actor-smoke.mjs and package script test:default-actor-smoke. Assertions cover actor creation, walk clip playback, environment hidden, and person-like shape metrics. Updated thresholds for new cleaner extraction path: MIN_ACTOR_VOXELS=90, MIN_SLENDERNESS=1.2. Smoke now reports activeCount=107, slenderness=1.67 on Model.spz.
title: Add smoke test for default actor extraction (person-like slenderness)

description: The offline actor preprocess cache flow now works end-to-end, but the real browser smoke on 2026-03-10 still logs unrelated startup issues: repeated THREE.Object3D.add object-not-instance errors during page boot and invalid gzip warnings from ButterflySplat/DynoEffectSplat optional assets. Investigate and remove those console errors so browser verification is clean and regressions are easier to spot.
title: Clean up startup console errors in browser smoke

close_reason: No console statements in render loop (hot path). Console calls are only in initialization, error handlers, and one-time proxy loading events.
description: Audit and remove/guard debug prints in render loop to prevent stalls when developer console is open.
title: Remove console.log from hot paths

description: Investigate current splat rendering failure, perform end-to-end workflow audit (import->voxelize->rig->animate), and deliver a detailed corrective plan for minimal editor UX.
title: Workflow audit: splat rendering + UI/UX simplification

description: Implement a localhost sidecar that bakes voxel-selected actor cache artifacts (subset splat, manifest, skin weights) and integrate the browser workflow to submit preprocessing jobs, poll status, load baked artifacts, and fall back to the in-browser path when the sidecar is unavailable.
title: Add local offline actor preprocess cache

description: Default editor layout consumes too much viewport space. Make default layout minimal (viewport + compact workflow), with one-click switch to advanced multi-panel workspace.
notes: Implemented workspace controls in top editor chrome with Minimal/Advanced preset switch and Reset Layout action. Dockview now supports minimal-first preset (tabbed left/right utility panels to maximize viewport), advanced preset parity, persistent workspace preset storage, and explicit layout reset/rebuild event wiring.
title: Introduce minimal-first Dockview layout and optional advanced workspace

description: Make inspector support selecting different entity targets and add a distinct world/level settings inspector context instead of a single fixed panel.
title: Inspector selection model + world/level settings target

description: Test voxel mesh alignment against generated splat, ensure segmentation driven by voxel selections, and verify test case that isolates person voxels, removes non-person geometry, and runs walk-cycle animation.
title: Validate voxel/splat alignment + isolate actor walk-cycle extraction
